metadata.owner_role: Senior Partner Manager, Google Play, APAC
metadata.notes: Fictional partners for Partnership Pulse prototype. All names, deals, and metrics are illustrative.

partners.name: MapleArc Studios

drivers: Strong launch of Lumen: Stardrift (+8): #3 KR top grossing for 2 weeks
Sword Chronicles content update slipped 6 weeks (-2)
Exec sponsor relationship strengthened: CEO dinner attended in March (+1)
Pending Play Pass tier-1 inclusion driving forward momentum

performance_recent_quarter.highlights: Lumen launch drove acquisition surge; ARPU steady on legacy titles

pipeline.deal: Play Pass tier-1 inclusion for Lumen

blockers: Policy team review on UGC moderation framework

open_issues: Sword Chronicles content update timeline at risk — partner engineering reports 6-week delay; impact on Q3 commitment
wins_to_celebrate: Lumen: Stardrift reached #3 KR top grossing for 2 consecutive weeks post-launch
Featured editorial placement secured in 8 APAC markets at launch

recent_activity.summary: Working session on Play Pass term sheet — partner pushed on exclusivity window; agreed to revisit
CEO sent thank-you note for launch support; flagged interest in expanding to Latin America
Tech sync on UGC moderation — partner committed to additional review tooling
CEO dinner with Director Park; discussed 3-year strategic roadmap

partners.name: Tsuki Forge Entertainment
partners.executive_sponsor_partner: CHANGED — formerly Hiroshi Tanaka (VP BD); now Yuki Sato (interim, ~6 weeks)

drivers: Stellar Vow revenue down 22% QoQ — competitive pressure from new genre entrant
Yokai Court policy violation incident in March (loot box disclosure) — appeal pending
Exec sponsor changed on partner side 6 weeks ago — relationship continuity disrupted
Two unanswered emails to new exec sponsor — engagement signal weak

performance_recent_quarter.highlights: Stellar Vow drag dominates portfolio; Saga of Embers stable but cannot offset

blockers: Partner hasn't responded to revised terms (3 weeks)

open_issues: Yokai Court policy appeal pending Google Policy team review — partner escalated to BD VP
Loot box disclosure remediation plan submitted but acknowledgment outstanding
Two unanswered emails to Yuki Sato (new exec sponsor) over past 3 weeks
wins_to_celebrate: Saga of Embers global expansion to LATAM completed on schedule
Policy remediation plan submitted ahead of deadline

recent_activity.summary: Outreach to Yuki Sato proposing renewal working session — no response
Internal sync with Policy team on Yokai Court appeal status — review still in progress
Brief call with Yuki Sato — introduction only; she requested time to ramp before renewal discussion
Partner VP escalated policy review timeline concern to Director Park

partners.name: Wavekit Games

drivers: TileTales: Cottage Bloom hit #1 in 4 SEA markets (+5)
Billing integration partnership with Eng team launched successfully (+2)
LATAM expansion on track — soft launch metrics strong (+1)
Won Best Indie at Play Awards 2025 (+2)

performance_recent_quarter.highlights: Hyper-growth quarter; TileTales franchise compounding; LATAM contributing 12% of new MAU

pipeline.deal: Featured placement deal for next TileTales title

wins_to_celebrate: Best Indie Game 2025 at Play Awards
TileTales: Cottage Bloom #1 in TH, ID, PH, VN simultaneously
Billing integration deployment completed 2 weeks ahead of schedule

recent_activity.summary: Roadmap review — partner shared 2026-27 title slate; 3 new launches planned
CEO requested intro to Cloud team for backend scaling — facilitated
Lin Wei + CEO quarterly check-in — partner expressed high satisfaction

partners.name: HanseoOne Electronics

contract.status: AT RISK — 2026 terms not yet finalized

drivers: 2026 pre-install agreement stuck in legal for 6 weeks (-4)
Galaxia S series launch successful with current agreement (+1)
Two recent partner meetings deferred — engagement signal weak
Escalation path to VP active but slow

performance_recent_quarter.highlights: Strong device sell-through on Galaxia S26 launch; Play Store engagement on new devices above benchmark

pipeline.deal: 2026 pre-install agreement for Galaxia S/Note/Fold lines
pipeline.value: Strategic placement on flagship + mid-tier device lines
blockers: Data sharing terms (GDPR / Korean PIPA compliance language)
Partner legal team requested 4 rounds of revisions
Internal escalation to David Liu and partner VP needed

open_issues: Two consecutive partner meetings deferred (April 22, May 5) by partner side
Legal terms iteration cycle exceeding normal SLA — 4 rounds with no convergence on data sharing language
wins_to_celebrate: Galaxia S26 launch (Q1 2026) — Play Store engagement metrics 14% above benchmark for new device cohort

recent_activity.summary: Scheduled legal sync deferred by partner — no new date proposed
Partner counsel sent fourth revision of data sharing terms — still significant deltas from Google standard
Quarterly tech review deferred — partner cited internal reorg
Escalated legal timeline to David Liu; awaiting partner VP engagement

partners.name: PaySamba

drivers: UPI billing integration testing complete (+3)
Compliance review pending — gating launch (-1)
Steady engineering engagement throughout build phase
First successful test transactions completed last week

performance_recent_quarter.highlights: Engineering integration on schedule; compliance review remains critical path

pipeline.deal: UPI billing integration v2 — production launch
pipeline.value: Unlocks Play billing for ~180M India UPI users
blockers: RBI compliance attestation pending — partner counsel working on submission

open_issues: RBI compliance attestation timeline uncertain — partner estimates 4–8 weeks
wins_to_celebrate: First end-to-end test transactions completed successfully
Engineering integration 95% complete, on original schedule

recent_activity.summary: Eng + compliance sync — confirmed test transactions stable; compliance submission drafted
Internal demo of UPI flow to Priya Raman — positive reception
Arjun shared compliance submission timeline estimate

partners.name: Dragoncoast Interactive

contract.status: Active — partner requested terms revisit mid-cycle

drivers: Wyrmlock Online revenue stable but not growing (-1)
Partner-initiated rev share renegotiation in flight (-2)
Empire of Tides expansion to KR/JP markets successful (+1)
Bone Lantern launch underperformed expectations

performance_recent_quarter.highlights: Portfolio essentially flat; Empire of Tides expansion offsetting Bone Lantern underperformance

blockers: Partner asking for 3pt rev share reduction citing competitive offers
Internal analysis on precedent risk in progress

open_issues: Bone Lantern post-launch optimization plan requested by partner — Eng resource ask pending review
Partner has cited competitive distribution offers in negotiations — verifying claims
wins_to_celebrate: Empire of Tides successful expansion to Korea and Japan markets
Wyrmlock Online stable revenue maintained through challenging genre quarter

recent_activity.summary: Negotiation session — partner reiterated rev share ask; presented counter-proposal on placement value
Partner shared competitive distribution proposal (high-level, no specifics)
Quarterly review — discussed Bone Lantern optimization paths

partners.name: Coral Reef Studios
partners.executive_sponsor_google: Lin Wei (Lead, SEA Gaming) — also covers ANZ indies

contract.status: Healthy — Play Pass GA conversation active

drivers: Play Pass beta inclusion won (+5)
Lighthouse Stories featured editorial in 6 regions (+4)
Strong critical reception — 89 Metacritic, multiple GOTY shortlists (+3)

performance_recent_quarter.highlights: Strong post-Play Pass momentum; expanded audience beyond core narrative genre

pipeline.deal: Play Pass GA inclusion (graduating from beta)

pipeline.value: Studio's second title — pitched verbally last meeting
blockers: Studio still scoping; no concrete proposal yet

wins_to_celebrate: Play Pass beta inclusion led to 88% MAU growth in single quarter
Featured editorial placement in US, UK, AU, DE, FR, JP
Metacritic 89 / shortlisted for 4 GOTY awards

recent_activity.summary: Play Pass GA term discussion — partner enthusiastic; minimal friction expected
Studio pitched concept for second title — narrative-adjacent, broader appeal
Marcus shared post-launch performance memo — highlighted Play Pass impact

partners.name: Crane & Carp Publishing
partners.tier: Strategic — UNDER REVIEW for tier downgrade

contract.status: Tier review pending — relationship status uncertain

drivers: No new launches in 9 months (-3)
MAU declining 15% QoQ across portfolio (-3)
Partner unresponsive to last two outreach attempts (-2)
Last meaningful interaction 4 months ago
Internal tier review in progress

performance_recent_quarter.highlights: Across-the-board decline; no signals of investment in revival

open_issues: No response to two outreach attempts over past 6 weeks
Tier downgrade decision needed before renewal cycle begins (Q3)
Unclear whether partner intends to renew at all

recent_activity.summary: Outreach to Watanabe proposing strategic discussion — no response (3 weeks)
QBR scheduling outreach — no response
Q1 QBR — partner joined 20 min late, departed early; no substantive roadmap discussion
Last substantive working session — discussed declining engagement but no commitments

partners.name: Equinox Pacific

drivers: Portfolio is mixed: 3 thriving studios (+), 3 stable (0), 2 declining (-)
Two studio-level escalations active
Master agreement renewal Q3 — preparation underway
Aggregate metrics stable but masking studio-level variance

performance_recent_quarter.highlights: Stable aggregate, but two-studio drag emerging; renewal discussion needs studio-level lens

blockers: Studio-level performance variance — renewal may need restructuring

open_issues: Two studio-level escalations — one on revenue share calculation, one on policy review timeline
Renewal preparation requires studio-by-studio performance review — not yet started

Three growth studios continuing strong trajectory

recent_activity.summary: Quarterly portfolio review with Aisha — discussed two underperforming studios
Revenue share calculation dispute for one studio — Finance team engaged
